findings.title: Missing rollback on CI publish failure
findings.summary: If the GitHub Actions publish workflow fails, the script exits without rolling back the GitHub Release or the git tag.
evidence: packages/remediate-code/scripts/release-and-publish.mjs:375 - waitForRunCompletion throws an error on failure, but there is no catch block to roll back the tag and GitHub Release.

findings.title: Missing tag rollback on GitHub release failure
findings.summary: If GitHub Release creation fails, the already-pushed git tag is not rolled back.
evidence: packages/shared/scripts/release-and-publish.mjs:279 - run('gh', ['release', 'create', ...]) has no try/catch to roll back the tag on failure.

findings.title: Missing rollback on CI publish failure
findings.summary: If the GitHub Actions publish workflow fails, the script exits without rolling back the GitHub Release or the git tag.
evidence: packages/shared/scripts/release-and-publish.mjs:286 - waitForRunCompletion throws an error on failure, but there is no catch block to roll back the tag and GitHub Release.

findings.title: Missing branch filters on CI triggers
findings.summary: The test-suite workflow triggers on all push and pull_request events without filtering to specific branches.
evidence: packages/audit-code/.github/workflows/test-suite.yml:3 - The on.push and on.pull_request triggers lack branch filters, meaning it will redundantly run on every branch push.
